title: ReviewPacket
description: Input to the Lintellect review pipeline. Constructed by the packet-builder from a GitHub PR webhook payload and GitHub API data. Validated at pipeline entry before any processing begins.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for this review job. UUID v4 format.

fullName.description: Full repository name in owner/name format.

pullRequest.description: Pull request metadata from the GitHub webhook payload and API.

examples: Fix auth middleware null token handling

description.description: Pull request body/description. May be null if the author provided no description.
examples: This PR fixes the auth middleware to properly handle null tokens...

author.description: GitHub login of the PR author.

baseSha.description: Full SHA of the base (target) commit.

headSha.description: Full SHA of the head (source) commit.

url.description: Full URL of the pull request on GitHub.

diff.description: Raw unified diff content obtained from the GitHub API (Accept: application/vnd.github.diff) or from git diff. Contains all file diffs for the pull request.
examples:
diff --git a/src/auth.ts b/src/auth.ts
index abc123..def456 100644
--- a/src/auth.ts
+++ b/src/auth.ts
@@ -42,3 +42,5 @@
...

commitMessages.description: Ordered list of commit messages in the pull request, from oldest to newest.
examples: Fix null check in auth middleware

files.description: List of files changed in the pull request with their metadata.

path.description: File path relative to the repository root.

language.description: Programming language detected from file extension or content. Null if the language could not be determined (e.g., binary files).

status.description: The type of change applied to this file in the pull request.

previousPath.description: Previous file path for renamed files. Only present when status is 'renamed'.

additions.description: Number of lines added in this file.

deletions.description: Number of lines deleted in this file.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this review packet was created.

metadata.description: Metadata about the webhook event that triggered this review.

webhookEventId.description: GitHub webhook delivery ID from the X-GitHub-Delivery header. Used for idempotency and deduplication.

installationId.description: GitHub App installation ID. Null if not installed as a GitHub App (e.g., personal access token auth).
